channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hegseth calls munitions stockpile shortage a 'manufactured story'
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified before the Senate Armed Services Committee that replenishing the stockpile could take 'months...'

item.title: Trump backs Collins in Georgia Senate runoff, his latest MAGA pick in GOP primaries
item.description: Days before the Georgia Senate runoff, President Donald Trump has announced his endorsement.

item.title: US ambassador says administration is fully committed to finalizing Iran deal on Sunday
item.description: Ambassador Mike Waltz spoke on ABC News as US and Iranian officials signal a framework peace deal is near.

item.title: Georgia's vote-counting method faces ban; lawmakers seek fix in special session this week
item.description: Georgia lawmakers are expected to address an election issue they created when they return for a special session.
